description: Container image registries, managed Kubernetes, and container orchestration tooling.

entries.name: Docker Hub
entries.summary: The default public container registry, widely used to distribute and pull Docker images.
entries.freeTier: Unlimited public repos free; rate-limited anonymous/free-tier pulls.
entries.paidFrom: Pro plan from $5/month for higher pull rate limits and private repos.

entries.name: GitHub Container Registry (ghcr.io)
entries.summary: Container registry built into GitHub Packages, tightly integrated with GitHub Actions for CI/CD publishing.
entries.freeTier: Free storage and bandwidth for public images.
entries.paidFrom: Private image storage billed per GB beyond free GitHub plan quota.

entries.name: Amazon ECR Public
entries.summary: AWS's public container registry gallery for sharing and discovering open-source container images.
entries.freeTier: Free storage and pulls for public images.
entries.paidFrom: Private ECR billed per GB stored/transferred.

entries.name: Quay.io
entries.summary: Red Hat's container registry with built-in vulnerability scanning and robot accounts for CI automation.
entries.freeTier: Free for public repositories with unlimited storage.
entries.paidFrom: Paid plans add private repos and higher build concurrency.

entries.name: Civo
entries.summary: Fast-provisioning managed Kubernetes (k3s-based) cloud, known for sub-90-second cluster creation.
entries.freeTier: Free credits for new accounts; no perpetual free cluster.

entries.name: Oracle Container Engine for Kubernetes (OKE)
entries.summary: Managed Kubernetes service that runs on top of OCI's generous always-free compute tier.
entries.freeTier: Control plane free; worker nodes can run on OCI's always-free Ampere A1 compute.

entries.name: k3s
entries.summary: Lightweight, certified Kubernetes distribution from Rancher, ideal for edge, IoT, and local dev clusters.
entries.freeTier: Completely free and open source, self-hosted.

entries.name: Portainer
entries.summary: Web UI for managing Docker, Docker Swarm, and Kubernetes environments without the raw CLI.
entries.freeTier: Community Edition free for up to 5 nodes (or 3 for Kubernetes).
